title: mentha × amplissima
intro: Mentha × amplissima, also known as Big Horsemint or Large Horsemint, is a hybrid plant species of the mint family, characterized by its large, oval-shaped leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Mentha × amplissima include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as colds and coughs, and its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Mentha × amplissima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments, to treat skin conditions and wounds.
